canonical_question: How do you integrate HRIS (Workday, SuccessFactors) with payroll providers and GL posting?
aliases: payroll to general ledger journal posting automation
earnings and deductions mapping payroll to ERP

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: ADP Pay Data Input v2 (2024-Q3); Workday 2025R1 REST API expansion

constraints: GL posting must complete before period close or bank file cutoff
Tax filing deadlines are immovable: US W-2/941 quarterly, EU country-specific
Multi-country payroll requires country-specific earnings/deduction codes: no universal standard
ADP API rate limits: 30 requests/minute per endpoint; Paylocity: 120 requests/minute
Workday payroll journal posting requires pre-configured Worktags and Ledger Account mappings
SAP ECP GL posting uses symbolic accounts mapped to FI GL accounts
Bank file formats vary by country: ACH (US), BACS (UK), SEPA (EU)

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs only HRIS master data sync without payroll processing
User needs time and attendance integration only
User needs benefits enrollment integration only

depends_on.label: Workday HCM API capabilities (employee master data source)

related_to.label: ADP API capabilities and rate limits

inputs_needed.question: Which payroll provider(s) are you using?
options: Global payroll aggregator (CloudPay, Papaya Global, Deel)

inputs_needed.question: Which ERP receives the GL journal entries?
How many countries does your payroll span?
What integration pattern do you need?
